faqs.question: What is Calder and how does it help my business?
faqs.answer: Calder helps modern businesses work smarter and move faster by removing complexity from everyday work. We provide tools to automate and simplify your workflows.

faqs.question: How do I reset my account password?
faqs.answer: To reset your password, navigate to the login page and click on 'Forgot Password'. You will receive an email with instructions to create a new password.

faqs.question: Can I integrate Calder with other tools?
faqs.answer: Yes, Calder supports integrations with various enterprise tools through our API. Please check our developer documentation for a full list of supported integrations.

faqs.question: What are your customer support hours?
faqs.answer: Our technical support team is available Monday through Friday, from 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM (EST).

faqs.question: How do I upgrade my subscription plan?
faqs.answer: You can upgrade your plan at any time by going to 'Account Settings' > 'Billing' and selecting the new tier you wish to subscribe to.
